description_long: This is a large, elegant house set on a landscaped property with a prominent front lawn, palm trees, and a detached garage. The main building features two stories with a symmetrical facade, arched entryways, and a flat roof with a rooftop terrace. The property includes a rectangular pool or water feature in the backyard, surrounded by greenery and paved walkways. The house is finished in a light, neutral color palette, with multiple large windows and decorative columns at the entrance. The detached garage is positioned to the side, connected by a driveway. The surrounding grounds are well-maintained, with a mix of grass, paved areas, and ornamental trees.
description: A two-story, light-colored house with a flat roof, arched entryways, large windows, and a detached garage, set on landscaped grounds with palm trees and a water feature.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, arched entryways, main entrance, and detached garage to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the detached garage, and the landscaped backyard with a water feature.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, water feature, and the back facade of the house with large windows and terrace.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side elevation, the water feature, and the arrangement of palm trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main entry with columns, steps, and a covered porch
